You are a helpful assistant.[e~[
]~b]user
user message[e~[
]~b]ai
assistant message[e~[
]~b]user
[e~[
]~b]ai
<think>
reasoning message 2
</think>

assistant message 2
<minimax:tool_call>
<invoke name="function_name">
<parameter name="argument">value</parameter>
</invoke>
</minimax:tool_call>[e~[
]~b]tool
